blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 blocked

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for geofencing functionality.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing feature, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for geofencing, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or testing, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied or unsatisfied.
